_comment: I500 catalogue ticker — single source of truth for the homepage ticker bar and the Door 3 preview header. Methodology shifted to strict per the §50 Honesty Test on 13 May 2026 (see methodology field + refresh_reason_log).
methodology: strict — Y* (present-with-caveat), P (partial), and N (absent) all count as blindspot because each fails the test 'is OFF a usable reference for this product'. Unaudited rows (blank OFF status) are excluded from the denominator until audited.
_note_display: skus_total (155) is the full catalogue count displayed on the homepage live row. blindspot_pct (93.2%) is calculated on the 148-SKU audited subset (138 / 148). The 7 unaudited SKUs are listed in the workbook with blank OFF status and queued for the next audit pass. The methodology page footnote should explain the audited-subset denominator for any reader who queries the math.
audit_method: OFF API lookup per barcode on the audited subset (148 SKUs); rate-limited at 2.0s with 3.0s retry on 429. Status codes per workbook legend: N (absent / 404), Y (present and accurate), Y* (present with caveat — stale / typo / partial), P (partial), blank (unaudited — needs check).

refresh_reason_log.note: +19 SKUs added between 25 Apr and 4 May; denominator drift only (no OFF-side numerator shift; existing N-flagged barcodes 0/29 sample changed). Headline shifted +6.4pp.

Two changes in one refresh. (a) Methodology shift from lenient to strict per the §50 Honesty Test — Y* (5), P (4), and N (129) now all count as blindspot because each fails the 'usable OFF reference' test; blank/unaudited (7) excluded from the denominator until audited. Under the pre-13-May lenient methodology the equivalent figure would be 83.2% (129 / 155). The +9.3pp jump from the published 84% headline is the methodology change, not a data shift. (b) Six SKU additions from the 9 May Caricom Grocers field visit, banked overnight 13 May (I500-150 through I500-155). The data shift alone — same methodology, audited rows only — moves blindspot from 86.6% (129/149) to 87.1% (133/148) so +0.5pp, below the §80 1pp public-refresh trigger. The methodology change is the load-bearing reason this entry crosses the threshold.
